name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_ndh_shift_report
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_ndh_shift_report' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`CompletedJobType` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate_shift` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate_shift` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`CompletedJobType` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate_shift` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate_shift` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'CompletedJobType|completedstatus|createddate|createddate_date|createddate_time|createddate_shift|completeddate|completeddate_date|completeddate_time|completeddate_shift' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_ndh_shift_report`
